title: Runtime Claim Status Schema
description: Schema for the machine-readable audit ledger of runtime claims. Each claim records a finding about the bami-content-fabric runtime, its evidence level, current status, and remediation ownership.

schema_version.description: SemVer for this schema, bumped when fields are added or retired.

area.description: Functional area: baseline-capture | routing | hint-validation | variant-policy | funnel-contradictions | circle-radial-arrow | manifest-runtime-conflicts | svg-classification | contracts | dependency-install | opc-audit | graphical-validator | ci | docs | release-gate.

source_file.description: File path where the claim originates, relative to repository root.

source_pointer.description: Line number, function name, or section identifier within source_file.

claim_text.description: Short description of the claim (what was expected vs what actually happens).

evidence_level.description: How strongly the claim is supported: scout-report | reproduced | static-analysis | test-output | product-decision.

reproduction_command.description: Command or script used to reproduce the claim.

observed_result.description: What was actually observed when reproducing.

remediation_pass.description: Which pass (1-4) is expected to fix this claim.
